author: Expunge
text:
bl remaster: recover into, re-target, or detach from a shared task hub

New verb: fetch a hub's balls/tasks, reconcile local-only tasks onto it (adopt history, replay, re-import id clashes under fresh ids with references rewritten), record the link per-clone or --commit project-wide; idempotent; --detach goes standalone. policy::state_remote_opt is the single local-over-committed seam (unset stays byte-identical). Source split to keep <300 lines; SKILL.md documents the topology. 100% coverage.
